news.t: Trump Media just launched 5 ‘Made in America' ETFs, testing whether political power can function as an investable theme

holdings.infoBox: TSIC is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Home Depot stock at 7.36%, Walmart at 7.12%, Costco Wholesale at 6.92%, Netflix at 6.47%, and PepsiCo at 5.58%.

overview.description: The Truth Social American Icons ETF Amrn Icons ETF (TSIC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is passively managed to provide exposure to US consumer companies considered to have iconic American brands. Companies with DEI policies are screened out, the remaining portfolio holdings are market-cap weighted. TSIC was launched on Dec 30, 2025 and is issued by Truth Social.
infoTable: Truth Social Yorkville American Icons Index

data.title: Trump Media just launched 5 ‘Made in America' ETFs, testing whether political power can function as an investable theme
data.text: Wall Street has seen plenty of thematic ETFs, but not one with a sitting U.S. president acting as a de facto marketing engine.

data.title: Truth Social ETFs Launch Today
